task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenCAD login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser open to http://localhost showing the OpenCAD login screen.

task_completion.description: Log in using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenCAD dashboard or authenticated area is visible, indicating successful login.
The 'Data Manager' page or section is visible in the OpenCAD interface.

task_completion.description: Select the Citation Types management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Manager is specifically showing the 'Citation Types' table or configuration area.

task_completion.description: Add the new citation type 'Equipment Safety Violation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Equipment Safety Violation' is visible in the list of citation types, or a success message indicating it was added is displayed on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenCAD web interface to add the citation type.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed in a web browser interacting with the OpenCAD UI, not via terminal commands (e.g., mysql CLI) or direct database administration tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenCAD application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows localhost or 127.0.0.1 and the OpenCAD interface is genuine, not a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open and being used to manually insert the text 'Equipment Safety Violation' into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected citation type to be added is 'Equipment Safety Violation'. The agent must add this via the OpenCAD Data Manager UI. The underlying database table being modified is 'citation_types'.
